== Notes for [[Item:Q87188|Q87188]] ==

[De La Pole.FTW]

Source: Kraentzler 1768, 1769. K: Vespasius Pollio. Three times Military Tribune and Prefect of the Camps.

[De La Pole.FTW]

Source: Kraentzler 1768, 1769. K: Vespasius Pollio. Three times Military Tribune and Prefect of the Camps.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
